services.title: Our Services

crm.title: CRM/ERP Integrations

edi.title: Document Workflow Automation
edi.description: Electronic document management, EDI, e-invoicing and automatic report generation. Eliminate manual document work once and for all.

bots.title: Chatbots & AI Assistants
bots.description: Telegram/Viber bots and AI assistants for automating customer communications, order processing and warehouse notifications.

custom.title: Custom Software Development
custom.description: Custom software development for your unique processes — from a simple accounting solution to a full-scale platform.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Development, refinement and scaling of web systems, business portals and personal account areas for your clients.

dashboard.title: Your Business Under Control
dashboard.subtitle: Centralized management panel for all integrations and processes

cta.title: Ready to reach the next level?
cta.subtitle: Get a free consultation. Together we'll find the right solution for your specific business — no fluff, no off-the-shelf products.

about.pageSubtitle: An IT company that grew from trading

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: ArtLogic is a young IT company born not from theory, but from practice. Our founder spent over 10 years in trading and reselling in Ukraine — and knows firsthand what it means to process orders manually, deal with warehouse chaos, use Excel instead of a CRM, and lose clients due to a lack of proper systems.
story.p2: We built ArtLogic for entrepreneurs just like we once were: small and medium trading businesses that need real, not off-the-shelf solutions. We use AI and cutting-edge technologies — but always with an individual approach and a deep understanding of how your business actually works.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Your business can't stop. Our solutions run 24/7, and our support team is always available — no matter what.

clarity.title: We Understand Your Business
clarity.desc: We come from trading ourselves. We know the specifics of small and medium Ukrainian trading businesses better than any outside consultant.

growth.title: Individual Approach
growth.desc: No two companies are alike. We study your processes and build a system for you — not force you into a ready-made template.

local.title: Modern Technologies
local.desc: We use AI, cloud solutions and leading tools — so your business stays efficient and competitive.

timeline.title: How We Grew
timeline.2022: Company founded. First clients — trading and distribution businesses.
timeline.2023: Launch of CRM integrations for wholesale companies. Partnership with Bitrix24 and other platforms.
timeline.2024: Team expanded with experienced IT specialists. Launch of AI-powered automation solutions.
timeline.2025: 50+ satisfied clients across Ukraine. Deep specialization in the trading sector.
